violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Plastic containers of Turbonado, or sugar, were stored under an ice bin that was dripping and a drain line for the drain above.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Paper boats and plastic lids on the counter by the food prep cooler were not inverted.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. A wet mop was being stored in the bottom of the mop sink and not in a position to dry.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Pineapple in box stored in an unapproved location. -Food stored under drain of hand wash sink.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Vegetable slicer needs further cleaning
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Walk in freezer floors were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Walk in freezer floor needs to be cleaned.
